title: OpSticks
description: OpSticks adds 8 insanely overpowered custom sticks with unique abilities, recipes, and textures for ultimate fun in Minecraft
body:
# 🌟 OpSticks

Overpowered sticks with insane abilities for Minecraft!

OpSticks adds 9 unique and powerful sticks into your Minecraft world, each with its own crazy ability ⚡. From teleportation to explosions, you’ll never look at a stick the same way again!

## 🔥 Features

- Bacon Stick 🥓 → Knocks enemies back with insane force!

- Enderpearl Stick 🟣 → Right-click to teleport like an ender pearl.

- Fire Stick 🔥 → Burns everything in your path.

- TNT Stick 💣 → Spawns primed TNT where you look.

- Lightning Stick ⚡ → Summon lightning strikes at will.

- Healing Stick ❤️ → Heal yourself instantly.

- Speed Stick 🏃 → Get a burst of incredible speed.

- Wither Stick ☠️ → Inflicts Wither effect on targets.

 More coming soon... ✨

### 🎮 Who Uses This Mod?

This mod is used by GamerFleet and other awesome Minecraft players!

## 📺 Credits

👤 Author: Shirjeel_plays

💡 Developed with love and creativity ❤️

## 🙌 Support Me

If you enjoy my mods and want to support me in making more awesome content:
👉 Subscribe on YouTube

👉 Share the mod with friends!

✨ Install OpSticks now and turn simple sticks into legendary weapons of power!
